sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68667" key="monosu/statos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-σύστᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of an art, <sense id="n68667.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">existing only while it is being practised</tr_>, e.g. dancing, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0613.tlg001:p.445" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.445</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
